summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LGSS SCUM Server Manager Iteration 10 - Install Gate, Power Buttons, and Import-Bulk Modal. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Install gate blocking Settings access, TopBar power buttons (Start All, Restart All, Stop All, Update All), per-server Restart button, Import/Export modal with 12 file rows, server switcher with disabled uninstalled servers, inline export buttons removed.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/servers/{id}/restart correctly returns 400 with 'Server not installed' for uninstalled servers
POST /api/servers/bulk/stop-all only affects installed servers with status=Running
POST /api/servers/bulk/restart-all restarts all installed servers (both Running and Stopped)
POST /api/servers/{id}/import-bulk handles multipart/form-data with parallel file_keys validation
Import validation returns per-row errors (ok=false, error message) without crashing the endpoint
Files not included in import correctly keep their current defaults (verified with notifications/raid_times)
ServerCard Settings gear button has opacity 0.35 and disabled attribute when server not installed
TopBar buttons in correct order: Start All → Restart All → Stop All → Update All
Inline export buttons removed from category panels - now only in Import/Export modal
Server switcher shows uninstalled servers as 'ServerN · (not installed)' with disabled=true
seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/setup/reset to clear state. PUT /api/setup with {is_admin_confirmed:true, selected_disk:'/', manager_path:'/tmp/LGSSManagers', completed:true} to setup. Sample files for import testing: /app/backend/scum_defaults/ServerSettings.ini (valid INI), /app/backend/scum_defaults/EconomyOverride.json (valid JSON)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 adds: (1) Install Gate - Settings access blocked until server installed, gear button disabled with opacity 0.35, (2) TopBar power buttons: Start All, Restart All, Stop All, Update All in that order, (3) Per-server Restart button appears when server is Running, (4) Import/Export modal with 12 file rows (ServerSettings.ini, GameUserSettings.ini, EconomyOverride.json, RaidTimes.json, Notifications.json, Input.ini, AdminUsers.ini, ServerSettingsAdminUsers.ini, BannedUsers.ini, WhitelistedUsers.ini, ExclusiveUsers.ini, SilencedUsers.ini), (5) Inline export buttons removed from category panels. Key data-testids: card-open-{folder}, card-install-{folder}, server-restart-button, start-all-btn, restart-all-btn, stop-all-btn, update-all-servers-btn, open-import-export-btn, import-export-modal, import-choose-{key}, import-input-{key}, export-{key}, import-run-btn, import-error-{key}. Server switcher shows uninstalled servers as disabled with '(not installed)' suffix.

stop_all_servers.behavior: Sets status=Stopped on all Running installed servers

import_bulk.returns: {imported, errored, results: [{file_key, filename, ok, error}], server: ServerProfile}

validation.wrong_file_type: ok=false with 'Invalid JSON' error for INI→JSON

import_bulk.unchanged_files: Files not uploaded keep current defaults

install_gate.click_does_nothing: Clicking disabled gear stays on dashboard

topbar_power_buttons.order: Start All → Restart All → Stop All → Update All

restart_button.position: Between Start and Stop buttons in ServerDashboard header

inline_exports_removed.verified: No export buttons found outside modal
inline_exports_removed.old_pattern: export-{category} buttons removed from category panels

regression.delete_confirm_modal: Working - custom modal with Cancel/Yes Delete buttons

mocked_apis.note: NO MOCKED APIs. All features are REAL: restart/stop-all/restart-all endpoints, import-bulk multipart handling, file validation.
